Details: Integration with Telegram Bot API for church announcements and notifications
Bot can connect to Telegram API and receive messages
Messages can be posted to configured channels
Photos can be uploaded and cached
Gallery module can fetch photos from Telegram
Set up Telegram bot token management and channel configuration. Create CRUD operations for channel management and connection testing.
Build message posting system with text formatting support for markdown and HTML. Handle large messages with pagination.
Implement photo upload to Telegram with local caching. Store file references and handle fileReference expiration.
Expose API endpoints for gallery module to fetch photos from Telegram channels. Support filtering by album date and tags.
Create sync mechanism to automatically convert Telegram posts to church announcements. Handle media attachments and link formatting.
Implement webhook endpoint for real-time updates from Telegram. Handle message edits deletions and new posts.
